case_title: DOSS 111, AUGUSTUS LLOYD VS SMITTY'S TRANSMISSION SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY DOSS 111, AUGUSTUS LLOYD AS TO DEFENDANT SMITTY'S TRANSMISSION SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
